code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut in_word = false
  mut first_done = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        if in_word
          in_word = false
        end
      else
        if not in_word
          if first_done
            out = "#{out} "
          end
          first_done = true
          in_word = true
          if b >= 97 and b <= 122
            out = "#{out}#{string.from_byte(b - 32)}"
          else
            out = "#{out}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
          end
        else
          out = "#{out}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
